HYPE.fallback_reason: Binance spot unavailable/unsupported (spot HYPEUSDT: HTTP 400: {"code":-1121,"msg":"Invalid symbol."}); used Binance public USD-M futures market data.

notes: Binance public spot ticker and klines are attempted first for mapped crypto assets.
If Binance spot is unsupported/unavailable, public Binance USD-M futures may be used as a labelled fallback before existing dashboard sources.
No private exchange credentials are used and no real orders are placed.

limitations: Uses Binance public market-data endpoints only; no real orders are placed.
Dashboard action-engine events do not auto-fill watch-only setups.
Open positions, when present, are imported from the local copilot paper portfolio JSON and marked simulated.
Execution price, slippage, fees, and exits remain paper-model placeholders unless a dedicated simulator updates them.
